docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $585.74 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AMIOT, REBECCA J. ESPY, ANNIE R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
